title: Rolling Stock
description: Replaces the minecart noise with Rolling Girl
body:
We all know Minecraft's default minecart noise is very annoying. This resource pack fixes this issue, by replacing it with the opening bars of [Rolling Girl](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vnw8zURAxkU).

I'm sorry for the icon. I tried to give the minecart pigtails but it ended up looking like spider legs. Alternatives welcome!
